reviews.comment:
Mala atención. Estuvimos las de 10 minutos en el surtidor y como nadie vino a atendernos, nos terminamos marchando. Me sorprende que sea una estación del ACA, ya que suelen ser muy buenas. Además, la estación está quedada en el tiempo, parece de los años 70, mal cuidada y decadente.

(Translated by Google)
Bad service. We spent about 10 minutes at the pump, and since no one came to help us, we ended up leaving. I'm surprised it's an ACA station, since they're usually very good. Also, the station is stuck in time, looking like it's from the 1970s, poorly maintained and decaying.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3N0t1eDFnRRAB
